meta.title: OT Security Score For Manufacturers
meta.description:
NIST funded a research project to create and test an OT device security score for devices commonly used in manufacturing. In this session, Ulrich explains the test methodology and provide scoring examples from some of the most popular vendors' devices.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
